_comment: Smoke bipartite matching (Ata–Xu §1). State Q in R^{L+K}. Default U1 arrivals from model.epsilon. Run: python main.py configs/smoke_bipartite_matching.json

model._comment_edges: X network (Ata–Xu Fig.2): left nodes {1,2} ↔ indices {0,1}; right nodes {3,4} ↔ indices {0,1}. Compatibility includes all four edges.
